name: 反差陷阱開場
description: 觀眾以為是溫馨的親人團聚，結果立刻揭露是一場精心設計的陷阱——找回親女兒只是為了讓她替養女頂罪。期待與現實的巨大落差製造強烈情緒衝擊。

examples.drama_title: 【ENG DUB】From Convict to Heiress: The Real Daughter's Revenge
examples.excerpt: Missing for 15 years. Biological parents. My dear parents found me. It would be a joyful family reunion. Never expected. It was a scheme with my eight fiances jointly set up for me. A colossal trap.
